deals.title: Borregas Property
deals.notes: Land development opportunity. Sisters terminated listing. Offered to Isaac Linares for mobile home project with veteran housing component at approximately 150K. No path forward identified.

logs.m: Listing canceled. Signs picked up. No path forward with sisters or Isaac development concept.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: Residential listing - underwater by 93K to 143K. Sellers moved back into property. Plan to make repairs and relist later. Mutual termination signed May 29.

logs.m: Listing terminated by mutual agreement. Sellers moving back in to make updates and repairs before relisting.
Honest conversation completed. Chandler laid off. Short sale likely best path forward.

deals.title: 485 W FM 462
deals.notes: Divorce situation. 3BR/2BA on 4.05 acres. Payoff ~257K. Recommend list at 295K. CMA pulled. Meeting held May 15.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter. Get listing agreement signed. Schedule photos.

logs.m: Met at property. CMA completed. Net sheet built. Files saved to listing-info folder.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: Referred by Isaac Linares. 3BR/2.5BA. Listed May 14 at 259,900. Sellers relocating to NC second week of June. Multiple showings. Second-look buyers returning. Insurance claim roof replacement in progress.
deals.next: Confirm tomorrow showing time. Follow up with second-look buyers. Monitor for offer.

logs.m: Multiple interested buyers in early search. Second-look buyers favorite. Pre-inspection report offered.
Investor cash offer at 176,300 discussed. 4th showing scheduled May 23.
MLS live. Neighborhood canvassed. First showing at 9:15am with cultural concern noted.

deals.title: Tilden 20 acres
deals.notes: Land sale - 20 acres hunting property. Espinoza family buyer through Javier agent. Price 113K. Earnest money pending. TXR 1903 amendment sent to Javier for financing update.
deals.next: Confirm earnest money received. Confirm signed amendment back from Javier. Verify Mrs. Espinoza email.

logs.m: Steve called back. Alejandra sent new T-47 via DocuSign. Steve completed and returned. Waiting on notary confirmation.
Espinoza family offer accepted at 113K. TXR 1903 amendment sent to buyer agent Javier.

deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Estate sale cash transaction. Sold for 152K on April 27. Lien blocker resolved through mobile notary and Fernando Castillo signature.
deals.next: Deliver gift to Joy. Thank Sam VanDenheuvel. Thank notary and UPS staff.

logs.m: Transaction officially closed and funded.
Lien release picked up from notary. Fernando Castillo signed. Delivered to Chicago Title.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Bank-owned REO foreclosure. Comprehensive cleanup underway. Electric reconnected. Flooring starting this week. Water meter pending. Police reports stalled.
deals.next: Call Medina Electric and EMCSUD for utility status. Replace camera batteries. Submit listing agreement to bank.

logs.m: Installed 3 cameras. Electricians reconnected. Drywall complete. Flooring starts tomorrow. Water meter 1-2 days away.
Drywall crew patching holes. Sent photos to Kelly. ACH mileage payment processing.

leads.title: Mike & Alice Howell
leads.detail: Rental being sold. Pivoting to new construction - no HOA requirement. Out of Corpus deal evaluation. Isaac brought wholesale deal 301 W Saxet Corpus at 85K for FHA 203k financing. Too much for them - still searching.
leads.next: Revisit new construction search if Saxet falls through. Confirm pre-approval status with Zach.

logs.m: Out of 301 W Saxet Corpus deal. Too much for them. Still actively searching.

leads.title: Bryce - VA Buyer
leads.detail: Met on-site at Priority Bank property. Wife is active military - VA loan eligible. Recently moved from Ohio. Currently renting. Looking to purchase in San Antonio area.
leads.next: Get Bryce contact info. Qualify wife VA eligibility. Connect with VA lender. Send VA Buyers Guide.

logs.m: Met at 181 CR 7751 property. Dumpster contractor. Wife active military seeking home purchase.

leads.title: Brandon Moran
leads.detail: Long-standing relationship - helped Brandon get into real estate. Uncle has Green Bliss rental property. Mom Milagros interested in new construction purchase. Budget 50K down targeting 1000 monthly payment.
leads.next: Confirm Green Bliss rental exact address. Get Mom's full details. Register as agent before builder visits.

logs.m: Buyer rep signed. MI Homes option from Frank still in play. Green Bliss rental TBD.

leads.title: Jerome Gardner
leads.detail: Downline agent Schertz/Cibolo area. Has buyer interested in fixer property. Unique situation details pending.
leads.next: Follow up with Jerome. Get full details on buyer and property needs.

logs.m: Caught up with Jerome. Details pending on fixer property buyer situation.

leads.title: Armando - Employee Buyer
leads.detail: Referred by David Roth employee buyer program. Budget 50K down targeting 1000 monthly payment. Open to multiple builders and neighborhoods.
leads.next: Get Armando contact from David Roth. Pull new construction options from multiple builders. Register as agent before builder visits.

logs.m: Confirmed no aging commissions with employee 5 percent down plus builder incentives route.

leads.title: Jahsia
leads.detail: Age 18 - finishing senior year. Referred by Julie daughter's boyfriend. Interested in getting into real estate. Needs licensing and career path education.
leads.next: Get contact from Julie. Explain licensing path. Share eXp information if appropriate.

logs.m: Sent check-in text about Skool website. Awaiting response.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Community connection through garden group. Grief to healing to plants story. Potential content collaboration with permission. Real estate potential through trust-based relationship.
leads.next: Follow up personally. Ask permission for story content. Keep nurturing relationship.

logs.m: Community connection noted. Content angle identified. Permission needed for story sharing.

leads.title: Miss Pat - Neighbor's Son
leads.detail: Neighbor behind Miss Pat may have passed away. Son now owns inherited property. Previous owner was avid gardener. Son not yet contacted.
leads.next: Get more info from Miss Pat - son's name and contact. Reach out with community and gardening angle first. Assess selling intentions.

logs.m: Miss Pat mentioned neighbor may have passed. Son inherited property. Sensitive timing - lead with empathy.

leads.title: Isaac - Investor
leads.detail: Investor contact met in person. Buy box unknown. Likely Schertz area interest. Full intake still needed.
leads.next: Full Sage intake call. Understand buy box, budget, timeline, strategy. Add to Bold Trail.

logs.m: Met in person. Investor interested in Schertz area. Intake pending.

leads.title: Kurt Lehr
leads.detail: Neighbor watching nearby listing at 9815 Conbes. Wants intel on offers. Possible seller or buyer lead - needs qualification.
leads.next: Pull CMA for Kurt area. Pull 9815 Conbes offer details. Report back to Kurt. Determine intent.

logs.m: Listed as priority number 2. Pull CMA and gather listing timeline information.
